description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wooden filing cabinet featuring a rich, medium-brown wood grain finish. The front face is organized into three rows and three columns, totaling nine drawers, each equipped with a large, metallic label pull handle and a slot for labeling. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the continuous wood texture without any additional features or hardware. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing small items or documents. The metallic handles and label holders have a slightly aged, brushed appearance, adding a vintage or industrial touch. This cabinet is sturdy and functional, designed for organized storage of files or small items in an urban environment.
description: A medium-brown wooden filing cabinet with nine drawers, each featuring metallic label pull handles and label slots. The cabinet has a vintage, industrial look and a flat top surface.
description_view_0: The front view displays all nine drawers with metallic label pull handles and label holders, arranged in a 3x3 grid.
description_view_1: The left side view shows a plain wooden panel with no visible drawers or hardware.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a continuous, unadorned wood surface with no openings or features.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain wooden panel without drawers or hardware.
